AssociatedWith: It is associated with Thundercat.
It is associated with Anderson .Paak.
It is associated with Herbie Hancock.
It is associated with Eric Andre.
It is associated with Ariana Grande.
It is associated with Earl Sweatshirt.
It is associated with Bruno Mars.
It is associated with Kim Namjoon.
It is associated with Mac DeMarco.
It is associated with Silk Sonic.
ConsistsOf: It consists of French keyboardist Domi Louna and American drummer JD Beck.
HasA: It has two Grammy Award nominations.
It has a debut album titled Not Tight.
It has a single titled "Take a Chance".
It has a single titled "Two Shrimps".
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by being a jazz duo.
It is characterized by being child prodigies.
KnownAs: It is known as DOMi & JD BECK.
KnownFor: It is known for their debut album Not Tight.
It is known for their single "Smile".
It is known for their Grammy Award nominations for Best New Artist and Best Contemporary Instrumental Album.
OccurredAt: It occurred at the 2018 NAMM Show.
It occurred at Erykah Badu's birthday party.
